C01_13.name: Scenario
C01_13.script:
FineDustLevel = (#AirQualitySensor).airQualitySensor_fineDustLevel
(#Speaker).speaker_speak("The fine dust level is " + FineDustLevel)

C01_14.name: Scenario
C01_14.script:
Pm10Weather = (#WeatherProvider).weatherProvider_pm10Weather
(#Speaker).speaker_speak("The outdoor fine dust level is " + Pm10Weather)

C01_16.name: Scenario
C01_16.script:
Power = (#Charger).charger_power
(#Speaker).speaker_speak("The charger's power consumption is " + Power)

C01_9.name: Scenario
C01_9.script:
TemperatureWeather = (#WeatherProvider).weatherProvider_temperatureWeather
(#Speaker).speaker_speak("The outdoor temperature is " + TemperatureWeather)
(#Kitchen_Speaker).speaker_speak("The outdoor temperature is " + TemperatureWeather)

C07_19.name: Scenario
C07_19.script:
wait until((#SoundSensor #BabyRoom).soundSensor_sound > 40)
(#Speaker #LivingRoom).speaker_speak("Noise detected in the baby room")

C10_3.name: Scenario
C10_3.script:
wait until((#HumiditySensor #LivingRoom).humiditySensor_humidity < 30)
delay(3 SEC)
(#Speaker #LivingRoom).speaker_speak("Humidity is low")
